zh.Weobley Castle, Worcestershire, England,: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾金頓
zh.Willenhall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾維倫哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Botetourt於1348年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Sir John Botetourt31歲，母親Joyce de la Zouche31歲。她於大約1362年與John Leveson II在英國斯塔福爾維倫哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1380年享年32歲。

zh-hans.Willenhall, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾維倫哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Botetourt于1348年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Sir John Botetourt31岁，母亲Joyce de la Zouche31岁。她于大约1362年与John Leveson II在英国斯塔福爾維倫哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1380年享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Botetourt was born in 1348, in Shropshire, England, her father, Sir John Botetourt, was 31 and her mother, Joyce de la Zouche, was 31. She married John Leveson II about 1362, in Willenhall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1380, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Botetourt est née en 1348, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Botetourt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joyce de la Zouche, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Leveson II environ 1362, à Willenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1380, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Botetourt 1348 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Botetourt 31 und ihre Mutter Joyce de la Zouche 31. Sie hat um 1362 in Willenhall, Staffordshire, England John Leveson II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Botetourt è nata il nel 1348 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Botetourt, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joyce de la Zouche, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Leveson II circa 1362, nel Willenhall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1380, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Botetourtが1348年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Botetourtは31歳，母Joyce de la Zoucheは31歳であった。約1362年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィレンハルでJohn Leveson IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1380年に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Botetourt(이)가 1348년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Botetourt(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce de la Zouche(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1362년 영국 스태퍼드실르 윌렌홀에서 John Leveson II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Weobley Castle, Worcestershire, England,: Kington, Wigreceastrescīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Botetourt nasceu em 1348, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Botetourt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de la Zouche, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Leveson II aproximadamente 1362, em Willenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1380, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Botetourt родилась в 1348 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Botetourt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce de la Zouche, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leveson II около 1362 г. в местности уилленолл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1380 г. в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Botetourt nació en 1348, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Botetourt, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joyce de la Zouche, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Leveson II aproximadamente 1362, en Willenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1380, a la edad de 32 años.
